zh-CN.name: 石榴
zh-CN.intro: 石榴是一种圆圆的水果，外皮红红的，里面藏着许多亮晶晶的小籽，像宝石一样。吃起来甜甜的，很有营养，能让小朋友身体棒棒。

story.title: 🦊小狐狸的石榴
story.body: 秋天到了，果园里的石榴成熟了。小狐狸抬头看，树上挂着一个大红石榴，圆嘟嘟的，外皮滑溜溜的。“这个石榴一定很甜！”小狐狸轻轻把石榴摘下来，用叶子擦干净，小心地掰开。哇！里面挤满了红宝石一样的小籽，亮晶晶的。小狐狸尝了一颗，酸酸甜甜的，满嘴都是果汁。它舍不得自己吃完，捧着一半石榴去找小兔子，又分给小鸟几颗籽。大家围在一起，一边剥石榴一边笑。小狐狸觉得，和朋友分享石榴，比一个人吃还要开心。

knowledge.title: 石榴的肚子里有什么？
knowledge.body: 石榴的肚子里有很多很多晶莹的小籽，我们吃的小籽其实是石榴的种子。每一颗种子外面都包着甜甜的汁水，咬一口就会爆出甜甜的果汁。

en.name: Pomegranate
en.intro: A pomegranate is a round, red fruit with a hard outer skin. Inside, it is packed with shiny, ruby-like seeds that taste sweet and juicy, and are full of nutrients to help kids grow strong.

story.title: 🦊The Little Fox's Pomegranate
story.body: In the fall, the pomegranates in the orchard were ripe. The little fox looked up and saw a big red pomegranate hanging on the tree. It was round and plump, with a smooth, shiny skin. “This pomegranate must be very sweet!” The little fox carefully picked it, wiped it clean with a leaf, and gently broke it open. Wow! Inside were lots of shiny, ruby-red seeds, all packed together. The little fox tasted one—it was sweet and a little sour, and the juice filled its mouth. But it didn’t want to eat it all alone. It carried half to share with the little rabbit, and gave a few seeds to the little bird. Everyone sat together, peeling and eating the pomegranate, laughing with joy. The little fox felt that sharing with friends made the pomegranate even sweeter.

knowledge.title: What’s inside a pomegranate?
knowledge.body: Inside a pomegranate are many bright, jewel-like seeds. Each tiny seed is covered with a sweet, juicy pulp. When you bite into one, it bursts with delicious juice.
